name._value: A Clue to the Secret Book

0._value: I heard #b#p608##k in #m10005000# is going through hard times... I should go check on him.

1._value: At the VIP sauna in #m10005000#, I met this bald man called #b#p608##k. He has a son, and apparently he ran away from home one day with a book that he cares deeply for. He requested that I find his son and get the book back from him. For a reward, he's offering me a nice sauna robe. He also told me his son #b#p320##k hangs out at a tree tunnel around #m10002000#, so maybe I can find him there. Anyway, is that book more important to him than his son?? What kind of a book is it anyway...????

2._value: I found #b#p320##k in the tree tunnel of #m10002000#, as requested by #p608#, whom I met at the #m10005003#.

0._value: Good job getting here. Actually, I have a favor to ask you. If you accept it, I'll give you a piece of clothing that you'll need in return. I think you are more than capable of doing it. Even if you don't care, please just listen to my story first.

1._value: I have a son that can do me no wrong. But one day he took a book of mine that is very dear to me and left. That book... hmmm... I can't tell you the details, but it is a very, very important book to me...

2._value: If you get me that book back safely, I'll give you a comfortable article of clothing, perfect for saunas like this. What do you think? Will you find my son and take back that book?

0._value: Ohhh... thank you so much. It won't be easy locating my son in this humongous Victoria Island. I'm guessing that he may be in a passage made of trees near the forest at #m10002000#, because that's his favorite spot... best of luck to you!
I see... I guess you're busy with things here and there... but I'll definitely reward you handsomely for your work so if you ever change your mind, please let me know.
Hey who are you? You know my dad well?

You haven't found out my son yet, huh. He took a very important book with him. I'll definitely reward you handsomely for your work. He may be in a passage made of trees near the forest at #m10002000#.
